titleStmt.title: SII 31.209: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 209. (A.R. No. B 212 of 1938.) CHIḌIPIRĀLA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall of the Vēṇugōpālasvāmi temple.

This incription is dated Śaka 1501(3), Vṛishu, Āshāḍha, śu. 11, Irregular. Since the cyclic year Vṛisha falls on Śaka 1503, as per the Indian Ephemeris, the date is corresponding to June, 12, 1581 A.D.

Registers the gift of land as mānya in the village Chadupurēla by Bomalāṭa Amṛita kavi Peddayya Chandārayya to Chandupurēla Pedda Chiṭṭayya for maintaining the puppet show as per gaṇa and yati principles in the village and also for his livilihood.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ê svastiśrī . jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1501(3) Agu
nēṭi vriṣu saṁvatsara Āṣāḍa śu 11 puṇyadipasaṁnāḍu boṁmalā
ṭi [raItu] boṁmalāṭi Amṛtakavi peddayya caṁrdrārayyagāru
cadupurēla pedda ciṭṭayyaku yiccina tharmaśāsanaṁ . nīvu tera nāṭakaṁ gaṇayati
saṁtariṁci teranāṭakānaku cadupurēla grāmaṁ nīku mānyaṁgānu Istimi
cadupurēla grāmāna mākālava tasaku Āṁni Anagala�raṁgāmuna nīvu paraṁparaṁgānu cadupurēlagrāma Istimi .
yika teranāṭakaṁ Āḍukabradikēdi guruvayyavālu �ṁjayyavrālu .
Digital edition of SII 31.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
